title: DND1-RNA-conformational-plasticity MD-analysis
author: Cojocaru, Vlad
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
This repository contains all analysis scripts, intermediate results, and final figures for the molecular dynamics (MD) simulation study of the DND1 tandem RRM–RNA complex, as described in: Vasarhelyi, R. G. & Cojocaru, V. "Conformational plasticity modulates sequence specificity in non-canonical tandem RRM-RNA binding" (2026). The analyses include RMSF, RMSD, center-of-mass distances, radius of gyration, solvent accessible surface area, hierarchical clustering, interdomain angle calculations, aromatic stacking interactions, hydrogen bond analysis, RNA kink angle calculations, and protein–RNA contact analysis. All trajectory analyses were performed using CPPTRAJ, with post-processing, visualization, and interdomain angle calculations carried out using Python scripts. The repository is organized by figure number. Each figure directory contains a cpptraj_analysis/ folder with input scripts, output data, and log files, and a plot_results/ folder with Python plotting scripts and the resulting SVG files used in the manuscript. The MD simulation input and output files (trajectories and topologies) required to run the CPPTRAJ analyses are deposited separately at: 
 https://zenodo.org/records/17940554 https://zenodo.org/records/17940953 https://zenodo.org/records/17944396
